amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 22 — paragraph 1 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 22 — paragraph 1 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission





a)



b)



c)



d)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

In the cases referred to inthe first paragraph, providers of the high-risk AI system shall immediately inform:

a) the distributors;

the distributors;

b) the importers;

the importers;

c) the national competent authorities of the Member States in which they made the AI system available or put it into service; and

the national competent authorities of the Member States in which they made the AI system available or put it into service; and

d) where possible, the deployers.

where possible, the deployers.
